main_decision: Final artwork should use all-mapped counts, thresholded downstream-CDS language, gene-level Fig. 2, row-level Fig. 3, and browser/user workflow Fig. 4.
scope: Final figure artwork execution source-lock after Browser v5.1 and manuscript patch; all-mapped denominator only; no selected-306 main denominator; no therapeutic candidate/no-go/report-card language; no final PA-family mode recommendation; no editing-efficiency prediction; no therapeutic-efficacy/safety claim; no patient-coverage estimate; no population/pangenome robustness claim; no boundary/scar inference; no global score.
